name: Mendable
description: AI chat platform for embedding RAG-based search and Q&A on top of product documentation and knowledge bases.

seo.title: Mendable — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Mendable: AI chat platform for embedding RAG-based search and Q&A on top of product documentation and knowledge bases.

when_to_use: AI-powered docs search embedded in a developer product
RAG-based Q&A chatbot trained on technical documentation
Support deflection widget surfacing answers from help content
In-app AI assistant answering questions from knowledge base
Developer portal chatbot reducing repetitive support tickets

pros: RAG chat on docs without building yourself
Quick embed on existing documentation sites
cons: Quality hinges on your doc hygiene
Competing against native LLM provider tools
review.verdict: A convenient docs RAG layer, but DIY options and incumbents make the moat thin.
review.best_for: SaaS teams adding AI search to product docs without building RAG infra in-house.
review.not_for: Teams with serious ML talent or strict data-residency requirements.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
